title: The Uninvited
writer: Dodie Smith, Frank Partos, Dorothy Macardle
actors: Ray Milland, Ruth Hussey, Donald Crisp
plot: A composer and his sister discover that the reason they are able to purchase a beautiful gothic seacoast mansion very cheaply is the house's unsavory past.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 2 wins & 1 nomination total
